title: Ecosystem Simulation
expandedDescription: Ecosystem Simulation started from an interest in genetics and natural selection.
The goal was to create a simulation where organism traits and genes change based on environmental factors. Organisms need to eat to survive and reproduce to sustain the population.
Each organism's genes define how fast it can move and how far it can see. Stronger traits come with a cost: higher vision or speed values consume more energy and require more food.
The old portfolio also pointed to the GitHub page for a more detailed breakdown of the simulation behavior and results.

projectInfo.label: Topics
projectInfo.value: Genetics, natural selection, and emergent simulation
